title: EARLY INTERVENTION AND EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: DOUGLAS EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EARLY INTERVENTION AND EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Early Intervention (EI): Individually designed services for children and support for parents to enhance children's physical, cognitive, communication, social emotional and/or adaptive development. Early Childhood Special Education (ECSE): Specially designed instruction for children. Support offered in the areas of communication, cognitive, social/emotional, adaptive and others. 1409 NE Diamond Lake Boulevard Suite 110 Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Any child 0-school age with a suspected developmental delay or disability is eligible for free screening and evaluation. Children determined to have delays or disabilities are eligible for EI and ECSE services Hours: Monday-Friday 8am to 4pm Email (541) 440-4794 ..12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 440-4794 Douglas County Windy Digby [email protected] Main phone (541) 776-2059 Josephine County Shannon Bilbao Nancy Lawson [email protected] Main phone (541) 883-4748 Klamath County Dena Haudenshild [email protected] Main phone (541) 947-3371 Lake County Michael Benson [email protected] Main phone (541) 494-7800 Jackson County EI/ECSE Stacy Inman [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment or referral form available on website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Douglas, Jackson, Josephine, Klamath, and Lake Counties Services: Early Identification Programs Early Intervention for Children with Disabilities/Delays Pediatric Developmental Assessment Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICES EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - SOUTH-CENTRAL EARLY LEARNING HUB EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOLING EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SPECIAL EDUCATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TAKE ROOTS PARENTING CONNECTIONS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE PUBLIC SAFETY - CARE CONNECTIONS AND EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOUGLAS EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
